plugin.name: Auto_Caster
plugin.author: Eric
plugin.description:
Auto Caster Commands
ac - Enables/Disabled Auto Caster acon - Turns Auto Caster on acoff - Turns Auto Caster off ac <skill or cast sn> - Sets Auto Caster attack skill or spell acthird <skill or cast sn> - Sets third fallback spell if both primary and alt are immune msgs - List spell messages available to use msgs reset - Clear all saved messages msg add <dmg message> - Example: msg add anguish The damage messgae of the spell is the portion highlighted below: Your <anguish> does UNBELIEVABLE things to Nixie devilment! [2554]@ msg del <index> - Deletes a specific message from the message list msg <index> trigger - Sets/Unsets a combat trigger message rlgmcp - Reloads GMCP to force Navigator detection without relogging caster debug - Enables/Disables debug notes
Original Concept by Endymion Stripped down, reworked and simplified by Heracles - You're welcome.

muclient.aliases:
<alias match="^ac( (?.+))?$" enabled="y" regexp="y" sequence="100" script="set_auto" >
<alias match="^acthird( (?.+))?$" enabled="y" regexp="y" sequence="100" script="set_third_skill" >
<alias match="^acalt( (?.+))?$" enabled="y" regexp="y" sequence="100" script="set_alt_skill" >
<alias match="^acopen( (?.+))?$" enabled="y" regexp="y" sequence="100" script="set_opener" >
<alias script="acheal_settings" match="^acheal( (?[a-z].+) (?[0-9].+))?$" enabled="y" regexp="y" ignore_case="y" sequence="100" >
<alias match="^msg (?\d+) (?t)(r?i?g?g?e?r?)$" enabled="y" regexp="y" sequence="100" script="set_message" >
<alias match="^msgalt (?\d+) (?t)(r?i?g?g?e?r?)$" enabled="y" regexp="y" sequence="100" script="set_alt_message" >
<alias match="^msgthird (?\d+) (?t)(r?i?g?g?e?r?)$" enabled="y" regexp="y" sequence="100" script="set_third_message" >
<alias match="^msgs( (?reset))?$" enabled="y" regexp="y" sequence="100" script="show_messages" >
<alias match="^msg add (?.+)$" enabled="y" regexp="y" sequence="100" script="update_table" >
world.Execute EvaluateSpeedwalk ("%1 (%2)")
<alias match="^caster (?\w+)$" enabled="y" regexp="y" sequence="100" script="switch_profile" ignore_case="y" >

trigger.match: ^.?\[\d+\] .+ is unaffected by your shroud of flame!$
trigger.name: alt_immune_trigger

trigger.match: ^Your faith is no longer being tested.$
trigger.name: faith_off

trigger.match: ^A calming aura of serenity passes over you\.$
trigger.name: serenity_on

trigger.match: ^Your pulse races as magical forces build within you\.$
trigger.name: proj_on

trigger.match: ^\s?\*\* You can take revenge on (.+) for 15 minutes\.$|^\s?\*\* (.+) can (now )?take revenge on you for 15 minutes\.$

muclient.script:
require "gmcphelper" require "checkplugin" require "tprint" require "serialize"
local damage_types = { "acidic bite", "light", "digestion", "magic", "slime", "mental energy", "air", "mind force", "beating", "decaying touch", "blast", "life drain", "charge", "bite", "crush", "chomp", "hit", "peck", "pound", "pierce", "punch", "scratch", "slap", "stab", "smash", "sting", "suction", "thrust", "thwack", "chop", "chill", "claw", "freezing bite", "cleave", "earth", "grep", "shock", "slash", "shocking bite", "slice", "friction", "whip", "wrath", "shadow", "flame", "wail", "flaming bite", "water blast", "divine power" }
local damage_verbs = { "misses", "tickles", "bruises", "scratches", "grazes", "nicks", "scars", "hits", "injures", "wounds", "mauls", "maims", "mangles", "mars", "LACERATES", "DECIMATES", "DEVASTATES", "ERADICATES", "OBLITERATES", "EXTIRPATES", "INCINERATES", "MUTILATES", "DISEMBOWELS", "MASSACRES", "DISMEMBERS", "RENDS", "BLASTS", "DEMOLISHES", "SHREDS", "DESTROYS", "PULVERIZES", "VAPORIZES", "ATOMIZES", "ASPHYXIATES", "RAVAGES", "FISSURES", "LIQUIDATES", "EVAPORATES", "SUNDERS", "TEARS", "WASTES", "CREMATES", "ANNIHILATES", "IMPLODES", "EXTERMINATES", "SHATTERS", "SLAUGHTERS", "RUPTURES", "NUKES", "GLACIATES", "METEORITES", "SUPERNOVAS", "does UNSPEAKABLE things to", "does UNIMAGINABLE things to", "does UNBELIEVABLE things to" }
local to_bool = {["0"] = false, ["1"] = true} local enabled = true local alt_skill = true local use_alt_skill = false local use_third_skill = false local autoconsume = false local autocast = true local navigator = false local autoquaff = true local copener = false local autoconsume = false local auto = GetVariable("auto") or "" local altauto = GetVariable("altauto") or "" local thirdauto = GetVariable("thirdauto") or ""
-- Profile system local profiles = {} local pprofiles = GetVariable("profiles") or "" if pprofiles ~= "" then profiles = loadstring("return "..pprofiles)() end local active_profile = GetVariable("active_profile") or "sorc" -- Migrate existing spells into the default sorc profile on first load if next(profiles) == nil then profiles["sorc"] = { auto = auto, altauto = altauto, thirdauto = thirdauto, triggers = triggers, alttriggers = alttriggers, thirdtriggers = thirdtriggers } SetVariable("profiles", serialize.save_simple(profiles)) SetVariable("active_profile", active_profile) end local messages = {} pvar = GetVariable("messages") or "" if pvar ~= "" then messages = loadstring("return "..pvar)() if messages[1] and type(messages[1]) == "table" and messages[1].msg then messages = {} end end
-- Load trigger tables from flat globals first (backwards compat baseline) local triggers = {} pvar = GetVariable("triggers") or "" if pvar ~= "" then triggers = loadstring("return "..pvar)() end
local alttriggers = {} pvar = GetVariable("alttriggers") or "" if pvar ~= "" then alttriggers = loadstring("return "..pvar)() end
local thirdtriggers = {} pvar = GetVariable("thirdtriggers") or "" if pvar ~= "" then thirdtriggers = loadstring("return "..pvar)() end
-- Profile system local profiles = {} local pprofiles = GetVariable("profiles") or "" if pprofiles ~= "" then profiles = loadstring("return "..pprofiles)() end local active_profile = GetVariable("active_profile") or "sorc"
-- First-ever load: build the sorc profile from flat globals if next(profiles) == nil then profiles["sorc"] = { auto = auto, altauto = altauto, thirdauto = thirdauto, triggers = triggers, alttriggers = alttriggers, thirdtriggers = thirdtriggers } SetVariable("profiles", serialize.save_simple(profiles)) SetVariable("active_profile", active_profile) end
-- One-time migration: if NO profile has trigger tables yet, assign the -- flat globals to the currently active profile only (never contaminate others). local any_has_triggers = false for _, pdata in pairs(profiles) do if pdata.triggers ~= nil then any_has_triggers = true; break end end if not any_has_triggers and profiles[active_profile] then profiles[active_profile].triggers = triggers profiles[active_profile].alttriggers = alttriggers profiles[active_profile].thirdtriggers = thirdtriggers SetVariable("profiles", serialize.save_simple(profiles)) end
-- Always load trigger tables from the active profile. -- Other profiles start with empty tables until the user tags their messages. if profiles[active_profile] then triggers = profiles[active_profile].triggers or {} alttriggers = profiles[active_profile].alttriggers or {} thirdtriggers = profiles[active_profile].thirdtriggers or {} end
local copen = GetVariable("copen") or "" local healname = GetVariable("healname") or "" local healsn = GetVariable("healsn") or "" local noaffmob = "" local char_status = {enemy = ""} local curr_state = "" local affmob = "" local special = true local shielded = false local pupquaff = "" local pbag = GetVariable("pbag") or "" local pmain = GetVariable("pmain") or "" local pdual = GetVariable("pdual") or "" local smain = GetVariable("smain") or "" local sdual = GetVariable("sdual") or "" local pshield = GetVariable("pshield") or "" local phold = GetVariable("phold") or "" local CasterDebug = tonumber(GetVariable("CasterDebug")) or 0 local quaffhpper = GetVariable("quaffhpper") or 1 local quaffmnper = GetVariable("quaffmnper") or 1 local quaffmvper = GetVariable("quaffmvper") or 1 local quaffautohp = GetVariable("quaffautohp") or 60 local quaffautomn = GetVariable("quaffautomn") or 40 local quaffautomv = GetVariable("quaffautomv") or 40 autoquaff_lastfired = os.time() pausecast = false
if auto == "" then enabled = false end if copen == "" then copener = false end if altauto == "" then alt_skill = false end if quaffautohp == "0" and quaffautomn == "0" and quaffautomv == "0" then autoquaff = false end if healname == "" then autoheal = false end
function get_char_subclass() any, p = CallPlugin("3e7dedbe37e44942dd46d264", "gmcpval", "char.base.subclass") return p end
function disable_caster() if enabled then ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Disabling caster!") set_auto("pk_disable", line, {auto = ""}) DebugNote("Disabling Timers") EnableTimer("spellcast", false) EnableTimer("navicast", false) end end
function reload_gmcp() local plugin_id = "3e7dedbe37e44942dd46d264" local status = ReloadPlugin (plugin_id)
if status == error_code.eBadParameter then Note ("Cannot reload ourself.") elseif status == error_code.eNoSuchPlugin then check (LoadPlugin (plugin_file)) end
if GetPluginInfo (plugin_id, 1) then Note (GetPluginInfo (plugin_id, 1) .. " reloaded.") end end
function check_subclass() if gmcp("char.base.subclass") == "Navigator" then navigator = true end end
function SetDebug(name, line, wildcards)
local dmsg = "off" if (CasterDebug == 0) then CasterDebug = 1 dmsg = "on" else CasterDebug = 0 dmsg = "off" end
SetVariable("CasterDebug", CasterDebug) ColourNote ("darkorange", "", "CasterDebug: " .. dmsg) end
function DebugNote(text) if (CasterDebug == 1) then ColourNote("darkorange", "", "Caster Debug: ", "white", "", "" .. text) end end
function in_table(tbl, val) for i, v in ipairs(tbl) do if v == val then return true end end return false end
function set_special(name, line, wildcards) if name == "faith_on" then special = true elseif name == "faith_off" then special = false elseif name == "proj_on" then special = true elseif name == "proj_off" then special = false elseif name == "serenity_on" then special = true elseif name == "serenity_off" then special = false end end
function set_shielded(name, line, wildcards) if name == "is_shielded" then shielded = true DebugNote("Shield Status: True") elseif name == "not_shielded" then shielded = false DebugNote("Shield Status: False") end end
function quaffinc() Execute("get inc "..pbag) Execute("quaff inc") end
function combat_round(name, line, args) if args.unaffected == "unaffected" then if use_alt_skill and thirdauto ~= "" then -- already on alt, now also immune to that: escalate to third spell noaffmob = char_status.enemy use_third_skill = true DebugNote("Target immune to alt spell too - switching to third spell") elseif alt_skill then noaffmob = char_status.enemy use_alt_skill = true DebugNote("Target is not affected by your spell") DebugNote("noaff: "..noaffmob) if gmcp("char.status.level") == "201" then if shielded then Send("wear "..smain) else Send("dual "..sdual) Send("wear "..smain) end end end end if navigator == true then DebugNote("Navi Match - .5 Second Timer Started") EnableGroup("triggers", false) DoAfterSpecial(1, 'EnableGroup("triggers", true)', 12) EnableTimer("navicast", true) ResetTimer("navicast") else DebugNote("Normal Match - 2 Second Timer Started") EnableGroup("triggers", false) DoAfterSpecial(2, 'EnableGroup("triggers", true)', 12) EnableTimer("spellcast", true) ResetTimer("spellcast") end end
function cast_spell() if char_status.state == "8" and enabled then if use_third_skill then DebugNote("Disabled Timers - Casting Third Spell") EnableTimer("spellcast", false) EnableTimer("navicast", false) Execute(thirdauto) elseif use_alt_skill then DebugNote("Disabled Timers - Casting Alt Spell") EnableTimer("spellcast", false) EnableTimer("navicast", false) Execute(altauto) else DebugNote("Disabled Timers - Casting Spell") EnableTimer("spellcast", false) EnableTimer("navicast", false) Execute(auto) end else DebugNote("Battle ended or Caster disabled, canceling auto cast round") EnableTimer("spellcast", false) EnableTimer("navicast", false) end end
function set_quaff(name, line, args) if autoquaff then autoquaff = false ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Auto Quaff is now ", "red", "", "disabled") else autoquaff = true ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Auto Quaff is ", "red", "", "enabled") end SaveState() return end
function set_consume(name, line, args) if autoconsume then autoconsume = false ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Auto Consume is now ", "red", "", "disabled") else autoconsume = true ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Auto Consume is ", "red", "", "enabled") end SaveState() return end
function set_opener(name, line, args) if args.copen == "" then if copener then copener = false ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Opener is now ", "red", "", "disabled") else copener = true ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Opener is ", "red", "", "enabled", "white", "", " and set to send '", "red", "", copen, "white", "", "'") end return end copen = args.copen ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Auto Caster will use '", "red", "", copen, "white", "", "' for your opener") SetVariable("copen", copen) SaveState() end
function set_auto(name, line, args) if args.auto == "" then if enabled then enabled = false EnableTimer("spellcast", false) EnableTimer("navicast", false) ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Auto Caster is now ", "red", "", "disabled") EnableTriggerGroup("triggers", false) if name ~= "pk_disable" then autocast = false ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Auto Caster will not re-enable itself") end else enabled = true autocast = true ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Auto Caster is ", "red", "", "enabled", "white", "", " and set to send '", "red", "", auto, "white", "", "'") EnableTriggerGroup("triggers", true) if char_status.state == "8" then cast_spell() end end return end auto = args.auto ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Auto Caster will use '", "red", "", auto, "white", "", "'") SetVariable("auto", auto) if profiles[active_profile] then profiles[active_profile].auto = auto SetVariable("profiles", serialize.save_simple(profiles)) end SaveState() end
function set_auto_on(name, line, args) if enabled then ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Auto Caster is already ", "lime", "", "enabled") else set_auto(name, line, {auto = ""}) end end
function set_auto_off(name, line, args) if not enabled then ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Auto Caster is already ", "red", "", "disabled") else set_auto(name, line, {auto = ""}) end end
function set_third_skill(name, line, args) if args.thirdauto and args.thirdauto ~= "" then thirdauto = args.thirdauto SetVariable("thirdauto", thirdauto) -- keep active profile in sync if profiles[active_profile] then profiles[active_profile].thirdauto = thirdauto SetVariable("profiles", serialize.save_simple(profiles)) end SaveState() ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Third spell set to '", "red", "", thirdauto, "white", "", "'") else thirdauto = "" SetVariable("thirdauto", "") if profiles[active_profile] then profiles[active_profile].thirdauto = "" SetVariable("profiles", serialize.save_simple(profiles)) end SaveState() ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Third spell ", "red", "", "cleared") end end
function save_profile() profiles[active_profile] = { auto = auto, altauto = altauto, thirdauto = thirdauto, triggers = triggers, alttriggers = alttriggers, thirdtriggers = thirdtriggers } SetVariable("auto", auto) SetVariable("altauto", altauto) SetVariable("thirdauto", thirdauto) SetVariable("triggers", serialize.save_simple(triggers)) SetVariable("alttriggers", serialize.save_simple(alttriggers)) SetVariable("thirdtriggers", serialize.save_simple(thirdtriggers)) SetVariable("profiles", serialize.save_simple(profiles)) SaveState() ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Profile '", "red", "", active_profile, "white", "", "' saved.") ColourNote("red", "", " Primary : ", "yellow", "", auto ~= "" and auto or "(not set)") ColourNote("red", "", " Alt : ", "yellow", "", altauto ~= "" and altauto or "(not set)") ColourNote("red", "", " Third : ", "yellow", "", thirdauto ~= "" and thirdauto or "(not set)") local tcount, acount, rcount = 0, 0, 0 for _ in pairs(triggers) do tcount = tcount + 1 end for _ in pairs(alttriggers) do acount = acount + 1 end for _ in pairs(thirdtriggers) do rcount = rcount + 1 end ColourNote("red", "", " Triggers: ", "yellow", "", tcount.." primary, "..acount.." alt, "..rcount.." third") end
function switch_profile(name, line, args) local target = string.lower(args.profile)
-- reserved words that aren't profile names if target == "help" or target == "status" or target == "debug" then return end
-- save current spells AND trigger tables back into the current profile before switching profiles[active_profile] = { auto = auto, altauto = altauto, thirdauto = thirdauto, triggers = triggers, alttriggers = alttriggers, thirdtriggers = thirdtriggers }
-- create profile if it doesn't exist yet if not profiles[target] then profiles[target] = {auto = "", altauto = "", thirdauto = "", triggers = {}, alttriggers = {}, thirdtriggers = {}} ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Created new profile '", "red", "", target, "white", "", "'") end
-- load the target profile active_profile = target auto = profiles[active_profile].auto or "" altauto = profiles[active_profile].altauto or "" thirdauto = profiles[active_profile].thirdauto or "" triggers = profiles[active_profile].triggers or {} alttriggers = profiles[active_profile].alttriggers or {} thirdtriggers = profiles[active_profile].thirdtriggers or {}
-- persist everything SetVariable("auto", auto) SetVariable("altauto", altauto) SetVariable("thirdauto", thirdauto) SetVariable("triggers", serialize.save_simple(triggers)) SetVariable("alttriggers", serialize.save_simple(alttriggers)) SetVariable("thirdtriggers", serialize.save_simple(thirdtriggers)) SetVariable("active_profile", active_profile) SetVariable("profiles", serialize.save_simple(profiles)) SaveState()
-- update enabled/alt_skill flags to match new profile enabled = (auto ~= "") alt_skill = (altauto ~= "") use_alt_skill = false use_third_skill = false
-- rebuild all triggers for the new profile update_spell_trigger() alt_spell_trigger() update_alt_spell_trigger() build_alt_immune_trigger() update_third_spell_trigger()
ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Switched to profile '", "red", "", active_profile, "white", "", "'") if auto ~= "" then ColourNote("red", "", " Primary : ", "yellow", "", auto) else ColourNote("red", "", " Primary : ", "red", "", "(not set)") end if altauto ~= "" then ColourNote("red", "", " Alt : ", "yellow", "", altauto) else ColourNote("red", "", " Alt : ", "red", "", "(not set)") end if thirdauto ~= "" then ColourNote("red", "", " Third : ", "yellow", "", thirdauto) else ColourNote("red", "", " Third : ", "red", "", "(not set)") end end
function set_alt_skill(name, line, args) if args.altauto == "" then if alt_skill then alt_skill = false SetVariable("alt_skill", "0") ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Alt Skill is now ", "red", "", "disabled") EnableTriggerGroup("triggers", false) else alt_skill = true SetVariable("alt_skill", "1") autocast = true ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Alt Skill is ", "red", "", "enabled", "white", "", " and set to send '", "red", "", altauto, "white", "", "'") EnableTriggerGroup("triggers", true) end return end altauto = args.altauto ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Alt Skill will use '", "red", "", altauto, "white", "", "'") SetVariable("altauto", altauto) if profiles[active_profile] then profiles[active_profile].altauto = altauto SetVariable("profiles", serialize.save_simple(profiles)) end SaveState() end
function unset_all(except) for i, msg in ipairs(messages) do if triggers[msg] then triggers[msg] = nil end end for i, msg in ipairs(messages) do if alttriggers[msg] then alttriggers[msg] = nil end end end
function set_message(name, line, args) local num = tonumber(args.num) local which = args.which if which == "t" then which = "trigger" end if messages[num] then if triggers[messages[num]] then triggers[messages[num]] = nil Note("") ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "You have cleared your ", "red", "", messages[num], "white", "", " trigger") else triggers[messages[num]] = 1 Note("") ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "You selected ", "red", "", messages[num], "white", ""," as your primary ", "white", "", which) end else Note("") ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Index "..num.." not found in message list") return end SetVariable("triggers", serialize.save_simple(triggers)) if profiles[active_profile] then profiles[active_profile].triggers = triggers SetVariable("profiles", serialize.save_simple(profiles)) end SaveState() update_spell_trigger() alt_spell_trigger() end
function set_alt_message(name, line, args) local num = tonumber(args.num) local which = args.which if which == "t" then which = "trigger" end if messages[num] then if alttriggers[messages[num]] then alttriggers[messages[num]] = nil Note("") ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "You have cleared your ", "red", "", messages[num], "white", "", " alt trigger") else alttriggers[messages[num]] = 1 Note("") ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "You have selected ", "red", "", messages[num], "white", ""," as your alt combat ", "white", "", which) end else Note("") ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Index "..num.." not found in message list") return end SetVariable("alttriggers", serialize.save_simple(alttriggers)) if profiles[active_profile] then profiles[active_profile].alttriggers = alttriggers SetVariable("profiles", serialize.save_simple(profiles)) end SaveState() update_alt_spell_trigger() build_alt_immune_trigger() end
function set_third_message(name, line, args) local num = tonumber(args.num) local which = args.which if which == "t" then which = "trigger" end if messages[num] then if thirdtriggers[messages[num]] then thirdtriggers[messages[num]] = nil Note("") ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "You have cleared your ", "red", "", messages[num], "white", "", " third trigger") else thirdtriggers[messages[num]] = 1 Note("") ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "You have selected ", "red", "", messages[num], "white", "", " as your third combat ", "white", "", which) end else Note("") ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Index "..num.." not found in message list") return end SetVariable("thirdtriggers", serialize.save_simple(thirdtriggers)) if profiles[active_profile] then profiles[active_profile].thirdtriggers = thirdtriggers SetVariable("profiles", serialize.save_simple(profiles)) end SaveState() update_third_spell_trigger() end
function update_third_spell_trigger() local match = "^You are (stunned|dazed)!$|^\\*?(\\[(\\d+)\\] )?Your (?<msg>" local cnt = 0 for i, msg in ipairs(messages) do if thirdtriggers[msg] then cnt = cnt + 1 if cnt > 1 then match = match.."|" end match = match..msg end end if cnt == 0 then SetTriggerOption("third_spell_trigger", "match", "(?!x)x") else match = match..") .+ \\[(\\d+)\\]\\*?$" DebugNote("Third Spell Trigger: "..match) SetTriggerOption("third_spell_trigger", "match", match) end end
function update_spell_trigger() local match = "^You are (stunned|dazed)!$|^\\*?(\\[(\\d+)\\] )?Your (?<msg>" local cnt = 0 for i, msg in ipairs(messages) do if triggers[msg] then cnt = cnt + 1 if cnt > 1 then match = match.."|" end match = match..msg end end match = match..") .+ \\[(\\d+)\\]\\*?$" DebugNote("Spell Trigger: "..match) SetTriggerOption("spell_round_trigger", "match", match) end
function alt_spell_trigger() local match = "^.?\\[\\d+\\] .+ is (?<unaffected>unaffected) by your (?<msg>" local cnt = 0 for i, msg in ipairs(messages) do if triggers[msg] then cnt = cnt + 1 match = match..msg end end match = match..")\\!$" DebugNote("Start Alt Trigger: "..match) SetTriggerOption("alt_spell_trigger", "match", match) end
function update_alt_spell_trigger() local match = "^You are (stunned|dazed)!$|^\\*?(\\[(\\d+)\\] )?Your (?<msg>" local cnt = 0 for i, msg in ipairs(messages) do if alttriggers[msg] then cnt = cnt + 1 if cnt > 1 then match = match.."|" end match = match..msg end end match = match..") .+ \\[(\\d+)\\]\\*?$" DebugNote("Alt Spell Trigger: "..match) SetTriggerOption("update_alt_spell_trigger", "match", match) end
-- Builds the trigger that watches for the alt spell's "unaffected" message, -- so we can escalate to the third spell when c 361 is also immune. function build_alt_immune_trigger() -- always match the known alt spell unaffected message local hardcoded = "^.?\\[\\d+\\] .+ is unaffected by your shroud of flame!$" local match = "^.?\\[\\d+\\] .+ is (?<unaffected>unaffected) by your (?<msg>" local cnt = 0 for i, msg in ipairs(messages) do if alttriggers[msg] then cnt = cnt + 1 if cnt > 1 then match = match.."|" end match = match..msg end end if cnt == 0 then -- no dynamic alt trigger set; use the hardcoded pattern only SetTriggerOption("alt_immune_trigger", "match", hardcoded) else match = match..")\\!$" -- combine hardcoded with dynamic SetTriggerOption("alt_immune_trigger", "match", hardcoded.."|"..match) DebugNote("Alt Immune Trigger: "..hardcoded.."|"..match) end end
-- Called when the alt spell (c 361) hits an immune mob. Escalates to third spell. function alt_immune_round(name, line, args) if thirdauto == "" then DebugNote("Alt spell immune but no third spell set") return end noaffmob = char_status.enemy use_third_skill = true DebugNote("Alt spell also immune - escalating to third spell") if navigator == true then EnableGroup("triggers", false) DoAfterSpecial(1, 'EnableGroup("triggers", true)', 12) EnableTimer("navicast", true) ResetTimer("navicast") else EnableGroup("triggers", false) DoAfterSpecial(2, 'EnableGroup("triggers", true)', 12) EnableTimer("spellcast", true) ResetTimer("spellcast") end end
function update_table(name, line, args) if args.msg ~= nil and args.msg ~= "" and not in_table(messages, args.msg) then table.insert(messages, args.msg) table.sort(messages) SetVariable("messages", serialize.save_simple(messages)) SaveState() Note("") ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "You added ", "red", "", args.msg, "white", "", " to the list") else Note("") ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Did you know ", "red", "", args.msg, "white", "", " already exists in the list? You do now") end end
function remove_message(name, line, wildcards) item = table.remove (messages, wildcards[1]) if item then Note("") ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "You have removed ", "red", "", item, "white", "", " from the list") else Note("") ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "You have failed miserably and removed nothing") end -- if end
function show_messages(name, line, args) Note("") if args.reset == "reset" then messages = {} SetVariable("messages", serialize.save_simple(messages)) SaveState() update_spell_trigger() update_alt_spell_trigger() ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Skill / Spell messages have been reset") return end if #messages == 0 then ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "No messages have been recorded yet") return end for i, msg in ipairs(messages) do ColourTell("gray", "", string.format("%3s", i)..". ", "white", "", msg) if triggers[msg] then ColourNote("silver", "", " : ", "red", "", "current trigger message") elseif alttriggers[msg] then ColourNote("silver", "", " : ", "red", "", "current alt trigger message") elseif thirdtriggers[msg] then ColourNote("silver", "", " : ", "red", "", "current third trigger message") else Tell("\n") end end Note("") end
function acheal_settings (name, line, args) if args.name and args.healsn == "" then if autoheal then autoheal = false ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Auto Heal is now ", "red", "", "disabled") else autoheal = true ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Auto Heal is ", "red", "", "enabled", "white", "", " and set to heal '", "red", "", healname, "white", "", "'", "white", "", " with SN '", "red", "", healsn, "white", "", "'") end return end healname = args.name healsn = args.healsn ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Auto Heal will use '", "red", "", healsn, "white", "", "'", "white", "", " on '", "red", "", healname, "white", "", "'") SetVariable("healname", healname) SetVariable("healsn", healsn) SaveState() end
function set_weapon(name, line, wildcards) if wildcards [1] == "pmain" then pmain = wildcards [2] SetVariable ("pmain", pmain) ColourNote ("yellow", "", "Primary Weapon Set to: " .. pmain) elseif wildcards [1] == "smain" then smain = wildcards [2] SetVariable ("smain", smain) ColourNote ("yellow", "", "Alt Primary Weapon Set to: " .. smain) elseif wildcards [1] == "pdual" then pdual = wildcards [2] SetVariable ("pdual", pdual) ColourNote ("yellow", "", "Primary Dual Weapon Set to: " .. pdual) elseif wildcards [1] == "sdual" then sdual = wildcards [2] SetVariable ("sdual", sdual) ColourNote ("yellow", "", "Secondary Dual Weapon Set to: " .. sdual) elseif wildcards [1] == "shield" then pshield = wildcards [2] SetVariable ("pshield", pshield) ColourNote ("yellow", "", "Shield Set to: " .. pshield) elseif wildcards [1] == "hold" then phold = wildcards [2] SetVariable ("phold", phold) ColourNote ("yellow", "", "Hold Set to: " .. phold) end --wildcards SaveState() end -- set_weapon
function acquaff_settings (name, line, wildcards) if wildcards [1] == "container" then pbag = wildcards [2] SetVariable("pbag", pbag) ColourNote("Yellow", "", "Potion Bag Set To: "..pbag) elseif wildcards [1] == "hp" then quaffautohp = wildcards [2] pupquaff = wildcards [3] SetVariable ("quaffautohp", quaffautohp) ColourNote ("yellow", "", "HP Auto Quaff Percent: " .. quaffautohp) elseif wildcards [1] == "mn" then quaffautomn = wildcards [2] SetVariable ("quaffautomn", quaffautomn) ColourNote ("yellow", "", "MN Auto Quaff Percent: " .. quaffautomn) elseif wildcards [1] == "mv" then quaffautomv = wildcards [2] SetVariable ("quaffautomv", quaffautomv) ColourNote ("yellow", "", "MV Auto Quaff Percent: " .. quaffautomv) elseif wildcards [1] == "hp per" then quaffhpper= wildcards [2] SetVariable ("quaffhpper", quaffhpper) ColourNote ("yellow", "", "Number of HP Potions to Quaff : " .. quaffhpper) elseif wildcards [1] == "mn per" then quaffmnper= wildcards [2] SetVariable ("quaffmnper", quaffmnper) ColourNote ("yellow", "", "Number of MN Potions to Quaff : " .. quaffmnper) elseif wildcards [1] == "mv per" then quaffmvper= wildcards [2] SetVariable ("quaffmvper", quaffmvper) ColourNote ("yellow", "", "Number of MV Potions to Quaff : " .. quaffmvper) elseif wildcards [1] == "status" then Note("") ColourNote ("red", "", "Auto Quaff Settings") ColourNote ("white", "", "HP Auto Quaff Percent: ", "red", "", "" .. quaffautohp) ColourNote ("white", "", "MN Auto Quaff Percent: ", "red", "", "" .. quaffautomn) ColourNote ("white", "", "MV Auto Quaff Percent: ", "red", "", "" .. quaffautomv) Note("") end SaveState() end -- autoquaff_settings
function do_autoquaff () if (os.time () - autoquaff_lastfired) > 3 then -- if we've fired within 3 seconds, don't bother with other checks, do nothing --DebugNote("Auto Quaff Checking time since last quaff") if autoquaff and enabled then -- if not enabled, don't do anything --DebugNote("Auto Quaff Checking if Enabled") if char_status.state == "8" then -- if fighting --DebugNote("Auto Quaff Checking Combat Status") if tonumber ((tonumber(gmcpval("vitals.hp"))/tonumber(gmcpval("maxstats.maxhp"))*100)) < tonumber (quaffautohp) then -- if HP in trouble DebugNote("HP below threshold - Disabling casting and quaffing") pausecast = true EnableGroup("triggers", false) EnableTimer("spellcast", false) EnableTimer("navicast", false) if pupquaff == "inc" then Execute(EvaluateSpeedwalk (quaffhpper.." (quaffinc)")) else Execute(EvaluateSpeedwalk (quaffhpper.." (dinv consume big heal)")) end autoquaff_lastfired = os.time () return else DebugNote("HP above limit - HP is at " .. tonumber(gmcpval("vitals.hp"))) end -- end HP check end -- end if fighting end -- end if enabled check end -- end 3 second time check
if (os.time () - autoquaff_lastfired) > 3 then -- if we've fired within 3 seconds, don't bother with other checks, do nothing --DebugNote("Auto Quaff Checking time since last quaff") if autoquaff and enabled and not pausecast then -- if not enabled, don't do anything --DebugNote("Auto Quaff Checking if Enabled") if char_status.state == "8" then -- if fighting --DebugNote("Auto Quaff Checking Combat Status") if tonumber ((tonumber(gmcpval("vitals.mana"))/tonumber(gmcpval("maxstats.maxmana"))*100)) < tonumber (quaffautomn) then -- if MN in trouble DebugNote("MN below threshold - Disabling casting and quaffing") pausecast = true EnableGroup("triggers", false) EnableTimer("spellcast", false) EnableTimer("navicast", false) Execute(EvaluateSpeedwalk (quaffmnper.." (dinv consume big mana)")) autoquaff_lastfired = os.time () return else DebugNote("Mana above limit - Mana is at " .. tonumber(gmcpval("vitals.mana"))) end -- end Mana check end -- end if fighting end -- end if enabled check end -- end 3 second time check
if (os.time () - autoquaff_lastfired) > 3 then -- if we've fired within 3 seconds, don't bother with other checks, do nothing --DebugNote("Auto Quaff Checking time since last quaff") if autoquaff and enabled and not pausecast then -- if not enabled, don't do anything --DebugNote("Auto Quaff Checking if Enabled") if char_status.state == "8" then -- if fighting --DebugNote("Auto Quaff Checking Combat Status") if tonumber ((tonumber(gmcpval("vitals.moves"))/tonumber(gmcpval("maxstats.maxmoves"))*100)) < tonumber (quaffautomv) then -- if MV in trouble DebugNote("MV below threshold - Disabling casting and quaffing") pausecast = true EnableGroup("triggers", false) EnableTimer("spellcast", false) EnableTimer("navicast", false) Execute(EvaluateSpeedwalk (quaffmvper.." (dinv consume big move)")) autoquaff_lastfired = os.time () return else DebugNote("Moves above limit - Moves are at " .. tonumber(gmcpval("vitals.moves"))) end -- end Move check end -- end if fighting end -- end if enabled check end -- end 3 second time check if (os.time () - autoquaff_lastfired) > 3 and pausecast then DebugNote("Vitals Recovery Complete - Enabling Caster") pausecast = false EnableGroup("triggers", true) EnableTimer("spellcast", true) ResetTimer("spellcast") end -- end pausecast check end -- do_autoquaff
function OnPluginBroadcast (msg, id, name, text) --DebugNote("GMCP OnPluginBroadcast") if id == '3e7dedbe37e44942dd46d264' then if text == "char.vitals" then res, gmcparg = CallPlugin("3e7dedbe37e44942dd46d264", "gmcpval", "char")
luastmt = "gmcpdata = " .. gmcparg assert (loadstring (luastmt or "")) () do_autoquaff () end end --end autoquaff if id == "3e7dedbe37e44942dd46d264" then if text == "char.status" then local any, pvar = CallPlugin("3e7dedbe37e44942dd46d264", "gmcpval", "char.status") char_status = loadstring("return "..pvar)() if char_status.state ~= "8" and curr_state == "8" then last_hit = "" skip = false use_alt_skill = false use_third_skill = false EnableTimer("spellcast", false) EnableTimer("navicast", false) if autoconsume then Send("consume") end --consume if autoheal then Send("c "..healsn.." "..healname) end --autoheal if not special then if gmcp("char.base.subclass") == "Avenger" then Send("c 519") elseif gmcp("char.base.subclass") == "Knight" then Send("c 519") elseif gmcp("char.base.subclass") == "Sorcerer" then Send("c 525") elseif gmcp("char.base.subclass") == "Priest" then Send("c 572") end --classcheck end --specialrecast if not enabled and autocast then enabled = true ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "silver", "", "Auto spell/skill is ", "white", "", "enabled", "silver", "", " and set to '", "white", "", auto, "silver", "", "'.") EnableTriggerGroup("triggers", true) if char_status.state == "8" then DebugNote("Auto Enabled and Casting") cast_spell() end end end --endcombat if noaffmob ~= "" and char_status.enemy ~= noaffmob then noaffmob = "" use_alt_skill = false use_third_skill = false DebugNote("Switched off noaffmob.") DebugNote("Set alt skill to false") if gmcp("char.status.level") == "201" then DebugNote("Level Check Met - Wielding Primary Weapons") if alt_skill then if shielded then DebugNote("Comabt Ended: Weapon Primary Weapon Only") Send("wear "..pmain) else DebugNote("Combat Ended: Wearing Primary Weapons") Send("wear "..pmain) Send("dual "..pdual) end end end if char_status.state == "8" then DebugNote("noaff mob cast retry") EnableTimer("spellcast", true) ResetTimer("spellcast") end elseif curr_state ~= "8" and char_status.state == "8" then if enabled and copener == true then --DebugNote("True and True") --ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Battle started - auto casting ", "silver", "", os.time()) Send(copen) cast_spell() end if enabled and copener == false then --DebugNote("True and False") cast_spell() else --ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Battle started - caster is disabled ", "silver", "", os.time()) end end curr_state = char_status.state end end end
function remind_disabled() if char_status.state == "8" then ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "red", "white", "Caster is OFF! ") end end
function casterhelp () Note("") ColourNote("red", "", "===== ", "white", "", "Auto Caster Commands", "red", "", " =====")
-- Available profiles (active one highlighted) local names = {} for n in pairs(profiles) do table.insert(names, n) end table.sort(names) ColourTell("yellow", "", " Profiles: ") if #names == 0 then ColourTell("gray", "", "(none yet)") else for i, n in ipairs(names) do if n == active_profile then ColourTell("black", "lime", " "..n.." ") else ColourTell("silver", "", " "..n.." ") end if i < #names then ColourTell("gray", "", " | ") end end end Note("") Note("")
ColourNote("yellow", "", " Spells") ColourNote("white", "", " ac", "gray", "", " toggle on/off ", "white", "", "acon", "gray", "", " / ", "white", "", "acoff", "gray", "", " force on/off") ColourNote("white", "", " ac <skill|c sn>", "gray", "", " primary spell e.g. ac c 541") ColourNote("white", "", " acalt <skill|c sn>", "gray", "", " alt spell (used when primary is immune)") ColourNote("white", "", " acthird <skill|c sn>", "gray", "", " third spell (used when alt is immune)")
ColourNote("yellow", "", " Messages / Triggers", "gray", "", " (tell AC the spell landed so it recasts)") ColourNote("white", "", " msg add <word>", "gray", "", " add hit word ", "white", "", "msgs", "gray", "", " list ", "white", "", "msgs reset", "gray", "", " clear") ColourNote("white", "", " msg del <index>", "gray", "", " remove a word from the list") ColourNote("white", "", " msg <n> t", "gray", "", " tag primary ", "white", "", "msgalt <n> t", "gray", "", " alt ", "white", "", "msgthird <n> t", "gray", "", " third")
ColourNote("yellow", "", " Profiles", "gray", "", " (each stores its own spells + tagged messages)") ColourNote("white", "", " caster <name>", "gray", "", " switch/create a profile (auto-created on first use)") ColourNote("white", "", " caster save", "gray", "", " save current spells + triggers into the active profile")
ColourNote("yellow", "", " Other") ColourNote("white", "", " acopen [<skill>]", "gray", "", " set / toggle opener (cast once at combat start)") ColourNote("white", "", " acquaff", "gray", "", " toggle quaff ", "white", "", "acquaff hp|mn|mv <%>", "gray", "", " ", "white", "", "... per #", "gray", "", " potions") ColourNote("white", "", " acconsume", "gray", "", " toggle auto consume") ColourNote("white", "", " acheal <name> <sn>", "gray", "", " set / toggle end-of-combat heal") ColourNote("white", "", " acweapon <slot> <id>", "gray", "", " slots: pmain|pdual|smain|sdual|shield|hold") ColourNote("white", "", " rlgmcp", "gray", "", " reload GMCP (Navi detect) ", "white", "", "caster debug", "gray", "", " toggle debug") ColourNote("white", "", " caster status", "gray", "", " show current settings ", "white", "", "caster help", "gray", "", " this screen")
ColourNote("yellow", "", " Quick start: ", "silver", "", "msg add <word> -> msgs -> msg <n> t -> ac c <sn> -> acon") Note("") end
update_spell_trigger() alt_spell_trigger() update_alt_spell_trigger() build_alt_immune_trigger() update_third_spell_trigger()
function loaded() check_subclass() EnableTriggerGroup("triggers", true) Note("") ColourNote("white", "", " Auto Caster loaded. Use ", "red", "", "caster help|status", "white", "", " for commands and information.") ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Auto Caster is ", "lime", "", "enabled", "white", "", " and set to auto cast '", "red", "", auto, "white", "", "'") if navigator then ColourNote("red", "", " >>> ", "white", "", "Navigator detected, Compliance! Speeding things up...") end Note("") end
function caster_status() Note("") ColourNote("red", "", " ------------------------------- ", "white", "", " Auto Caster Status ", "red", "", " -------------------------------") ColourNote("red", "", "| |") ColourNote("red", "", "| |") ColourNote("red", "", "|", "white", "", " Feature Status Setting ", "red", "", "|") ColourNote("red", "", "|", "white", "", " ----------------- ----------------- -------------- ", "red", "", "|") ColourNote("red", "", "|", "white", "", " Caster ", "lime", "", "Enabled", "", "", " ", "Yellow", "", auto, "red", "", " |") ColourNote("red", "", "|", "white", "", " Active Profile ", "lime", "", " ", "", "", " ", "Yellow", "", active_profile, "red", "", " |") ColourNote("red", "", "|", "red", "", " Primary Weapon ", "lime", "", " ", "", "", " ", "Yellow", "", pmain, "red", "", " |") ColourNote("red", "", "|", "red", "", " Primary Dual ", "lime", "", " ", "", "", " ", "Yellow", "", pdual, "red", "", " |") ColourNote("red", "", "| |") if alt_skill then ColourNote("red", "", "|", "white", "", " Alt Caster ", "lime", "", "Enabled", "", "", " ", "Yellow", "", altauto, "red", "", " |") ColourNote("red", "", "|", "red", "", " Secondary Weapon ", "lime", "", " ", "", "", " ", "Yellow", "", smain, "red", "", " |") ColourNote("red", "", "|", "red", "", " Secondary Dual ", "lime", "", " ", "", "", " ", "Yellow", "", sdual, "red", "", " |") ColourNote("red", "", "| |") else ColourNote("red", "", "|", "white", "", " Alt Caster ", "red", "", "Disabled", "", "", " ", "Yellow", "", altauto, "red", "", " |") ColourNote("red", "", "|", "red", "", " Secondary Weapon ", "lime", "", "Temp", "", "", " ", "Yellow", "", smain, "red", "", " |") ColourNote("red", "", "|", "red", "", " Secondary Dual ", "lime", "", "Temp", "", "", " ", "Yellow", "", sdual, "red", "", " |") ColourNote("red", "", "| |") end if copener then ColourNote("red", "", "|", "white", "", " Opener ", "lime", "", "Enabled", "", "", " ", "Yellow", "", copen, "red", "", " |") else ColourNote("red", "", "|", "white", "", " Opener ", "red", "", "Disabled", "", "", " ", "Yellow", "", copen, "red", "", " |") end if autoconsume then ColourNote("red", "", "|", "white", "", " Consume ", "lime", "", "Enabled", "", "", " ", "Yellow", "", "Consume", "red", "", " |") else ColourNote("red", "", "|", "white", "", " Consume ", "red", "", "Disabled", "", "", " ", "Yellow", "", "Consume", "red", "", " |") end ColourNote("red", "", "| |") if autoheal then ColourNote("red", "", "|", "white", "", " EoC Heal ", "lime", "", "Enabled", "", "", " ", "Yellow", "", "", "red", "", " |") ColourNote("red", "", "|", "red", "", " Target ", "lime", "", healname, "", "", " ", "Yellow", "", healsn, "red", "", " |") else ColourNote("red", "", "|", "white", "", " EoC Heal ", "red", "", "Disabled", "", "", " ", "Yellow", "", "", "red", "", " |") ColourNote("red", "", "|", "red", "", " Target ", "lime", "", healname, "", "", " ", "Yellow", "", healsn, "red", "", " |") end ColourNote("red", "", "| |") if autoquaff then ColourNote("red", "", "|", "white", "", " Auto Quaff ", "lime", "", "Enabled", "", "", " ", "Yellow", "", "", "red", "", " |") ColourNote("red", "", "|", "red", "", " HP ", "white", "", "Quaff %: ", "lime", "", quaffautohp, "", "", " ", "white", "", "Quaff #: ", "Lime", "", quaffhpper, "red", "", " |") ColourNote("red", "", "|", "cyan", "", " MN ", "white", "", "Quaff %: ", "lime", "", quaffautomn, "", "", " ", "white", "", "Quaff #: ", "Lime", "", quaffmnper, "red", "", " |") ColourNote("red", "", "|", "yellow", "", " MV ", "white", "", "Quaff %: ", "lime", "", quaffautomv, "", "", " ", "white", "", "Quaff #: ", "Lime", "", quaffmvper, "red", "", " |") else ColourNote("red", "", "|", "white", "", " Auto Quaff ", "red", "", "Disabled", "", "", " ", "Yellow", "", "", "red", "", " |") ColourNote("red", "", "|", "red", "", " HP ", "white", "", "Quaff %: ", "red", "", quaffautohp, "", "", " ", "white", "", "Quaff #: ", "red", "", quaffhpper, "red", "", " |") ColourNote("red", "", "|", "cyan", "", " MN ", "white", "", "Quaff %: ", "red", "", quaffautomn, "", "", " ", "white", "", "Quaff #: ", "red", "", quaffmnper, "red", "", " |") ColourNote("red", "", "|", "yellow", "", " MV ", "white", "", "Quaff %: ", "red", "", quaffautomv, "", "", " ", "white", "", "Quaff #: ", "red", "", quaffmvper, "red", "", " |") end ColourNote("red", "", "| |") ColourNote("red", "", "| |") ColourNote("red", "", "------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------") Note("") end
DoAfterSpecial(2, "loaded()", 12)
